sections.section_title: Specialist technology staffing for global industry.
sections.text: We offer our clients a comprehensive suite of organized staffing solutions. We specialize in sourcing and placing leading talent with niche technology skill sets to solve your needs and deliver desired outcomes. VDart is one of the most trusted IT staffing agencies in the United States, serving clients across various industries. We are committed to the philosophy of providing talents that enables our clients to deliver on their organizational and operational goals. Our experts assess our client’s business problems, market dynamics, and organizational culture to bring together the right people. Specializing in digital and emerging technology, we provide talent in niche areas such as SMAC (social, mobile, analytics and cloud), ERP (SAP and Oracle), Business Intelligence, and Infrastructure. We serve a global roster of customers and specialize in identifying niche talent in geographies including North America, EMEA, APAC, and Latin America, ensuring that our clients have access to the talent they need, wherever and whenever they need. Transforming the industry requires the right skills for the proper role at the right time. We provide a range of solutions tailored to each client’s needs to ensure they have the available resources per their convenience and requirements. Our recruiting specialists have made screening and hiring for short-term projects more accessible for our clients. Our contract services enable our clients to fill short-term staffing needs across industries. Our dedicated team works closely with our clients to meet their staffing needs for upcoming projects and seasonal requirements. Hiring individuals on a contract basis allows these companies to maintain staff levels. Contract to hire enables organizations to engage additional staff for some time with the option to convert them to full-time employment. Working with clients across a wide range of industries, we provide contract-to-hire solutions for projects where resources need to be filled immediately but with a view toward future growth. Our contract-to-hire services help our clients to evaluate the risk of hiring directly and to know in the initial contract period if a candidate is a perfect fit. We invest time in understanding our client’s business requirements, industry skill sets, workforce market, and other relevant information regarding the position to ensure we deliver the right candidate. Our recruitment experts employ leading search processes to find, screen, and qualify candidates. We save our clients time and costs by making hiring more efficient candidates by ensuring they have the right talent that fits the job description and matches company culture, attitude, and tenure for long-term success. Our extensive experience, expertise in supplier rationalization, and established track record of working with industry leaders speak for themselves, as our portfolio showcases successful collaborations with complex, multi-billion-dollar clients. Our reputation spans across continents, including the USA, Canada, the UK, and India, and our global presence empowers us to deliver cost savings and minimize disruptions, regardless of the geographic location. Our core objectives encompass optimizing tail spending, achieving substantial cost savings within our existing contractor relationships, and reducing both direct and indirect supplier layers. We specialize in tailored contract negotiation, compliance, governance, and support for geographical expansion. What truly sets VDart apart is our exclusive Preferred Partner program, backed by robust governance, substantial financial support, and a dedicated legal and compliance team essential for the efficient execution of the Supplier Rationalization Initiative. As a certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE Supplier), we are committed to enhancing our clients’ diversity spending, while our extensive support empowers them to expand into new regions. VDart serves as a trusted interface between clients and vendors, ensuring compliance in various operating environments. We provide an all-inclusive range of HTD (Hire, Train & Deploy) solutions that offer a fresh approach to talent acquisition, development, and deployment, helping our clients source, train, and place the right talent for their organizations, whether they are small businesses or global corporations. Our tailored training programs, including accent-neutral, technical, and cultural fitment training, ensure that our clients are equipped with a seamless talent pipeline from entry-level to specialized roles, with access to diverse markets and talent pools worldwide to serve a global clientele. From background checks to payroll management, VDart handles operational intricacies with a customized approach, ensuring a hassle-free experience. Our strong relationships with prestigious universities like Indian Institutes of Management (IIT), National Institutes of Technology (NIT) in India, and Georgia Tech in the United States, along with expert trainers from industry leaders such as IBM and HP leverage our technology curriculum to equip our clients’ workforce with cutting-edge technical skills and help them identify, report, resolve issues, handle customer interactions, and more. Dedicated to promoting diversity and inclusion, VDart facilitates expanded diversity spending and global expansion. Our expert Business Intelligence and Infrastructure team, recruits across a wide range of areas and roles within the industry, helping our clients to stay at the forefront. sections.section_title: VDart Digital: Transforming Businesses Through Digital Excellence
sections.text: Our specialized digital services division, VDart Digital, delivers exceptional digital services to our clients, empowering them to revolutionize their businesses. Our customer-centric approach and technical expertise create tailored remedies for organizational challenges, optimizing costs and maximizing efficacy. We work with our clients through our dedicated digital solutions branch, VDart Digital, to provide innovative digital transformation solutions. Our insights and expertise help our clients to adapt and transform quickly, helping them solve challenges and capitalize on the opportunities digital transformation is creating today. Employing a collaborative process, our dedicated teams design, build, test, and iterate, providing a high-touch relationship for our clients to embrace transformation as a continuous way of working and reimagining their business in today’s age of digital transformation. By harnessing new and emerging technologies, we help our clients to learn from their data and build an effective digital strategy. We provide support and guidance, allowing them to discover new possibilities, solve challenges to become more effective today and position themselves for growth tomorrow. Our intelligent automation solutions seamlessly integrate our clients’ unique operations and technology, combining BPM, RPA, and Artificial Intelligence to automate their company’s processes effectively. Through people, processes, and technology, we solve complex problems for our clients, working with them to design, build and implement innovative products and experiences that provide transformation and growth. In today’s volatile business environment, having a dependable IT infrastructure to support your operations is critical. With our managed services, businesses can ensure their systems run efficiently and securely. Through people, processes and technology we solve complex problems for our clients, working with them to design, build and implement innovative products and experiences that provide transformation and growth. Providing assessment and audit, Security Operations & Management (SOC), Security Information & Event Management (SIEM), Penetration Testing, and Identity and access management, we enable growth with confidence for our clients. Through strategic alliances with leading cloud providers, we create intelligent cloud solutions that increase productivity, improve compliance, and maximize value for our clients. Using intelligent automated software and autonomous testing, we provide insights about software systems’ logic, accuracy, suitability, security, and code efficiency to help our clients improve efficiency, save time, and reduce costs. Our unified automation for end-to-end SaaS Application management provides clients with an intuitive solution for defect management, analytics, tooling, traceability, and execution across multi-cloud processes. We work across various industries, providing radical rethinking of business models and specialist expertise to solve specific needs. This multi-faceted approach enables us to share ideas and knowledge across teams to offer out-of-the-box solutions and solve challenges innovatively. We’re engaged with many leaders within the automotive industry, helping them address their business challenges and creating innovative solutions through augmented reality, virtual reality, and mixed reality. Providing comprehensive, integrated solutions across a wide range of segments within the industry, we provide deep industry knowledge and insights to meet client needs today and provide growth avenues for tomorrow. Working within the healthcare and life sciences sector, we’re providing a wide range of end-to-end services to help our clients become the intelligent healthcare solution provider we all need for a happy, healthy future. As a relationship-driven organization, we always seek to develop mutually beneficial connections. We’ve developed strong partnerships with some of the world’s top technology providers through this idea. The solutions provided by Forgerock help people safely and simply connect worldwide through exceptional digital experiences, developing commercial open source identity and access management products for enterprise, consumer, cloud, mobile and IoT environments. With our expertise within these fields, we partner with Forgerock to produce better business solutions for our clients including IAM implementation and post implementation production support for a large automotive manufacturer. Softomotive is empowering people and enterprise by helping organizations solve complex problems around robotic process automation. Through our partnership with Softomotive, we’ve been successful in solving many complex business problems for our clients enhancing their business processes. Combining analysis, design, and engineering expertise, we’re shaping tomorrow by building great solutions today.

Developed for the automotive industry, VGO™ is a next-level mobility and fleet management system that provides the features and solutions for mobility management solutions in the USA to manage, grow and expand their business successfully. Our innovative, global in-car experiences, mobile suite, and online system give fleet management solutions in the USA a robust all-in-one solution for managing their fleet, streamlining vehicle management, and efficiently automating your rental process. Fleet management services in the USA can activate our proprietary digital key solution in any compatible vehicle to provide a convenient connected experience for customers and employees to securely use and share digital keys. Fleet management solutions can now quickly recover costs incurred by customers for tolls, fuel, and damage. It can help track vehicle status automatically, including mileage, battery, energy levels, engine, tire pressure, recalls, and vehicle maintenance. Mobility management services can give their employees specific access rights to support customer onboarding, manage inventory and customer base, track vehicle maintenance, and get time-based use of digital keys. With a robust mobile app suite and white-label solution, mobility management providers can rent out their fleet to customers worldwide under your brand name through our global app for expanded reach. Harnessing the Power of Academic Partnerships & Mentoring Programs .

sections.section_title: From the Heart of Trichy to Embracing the American Dream.
sections.text: A terrace startup that soon became a global corporation, transforming the lives of talents. When VDart was founded 17 years ago by our charismatic President & CEO Sidd Ahmed, it was not merely to generate revenue but was the seed that was laid on the foundation of a purpose beyond profits- that of a deep calling to drive change and transform lives in the founder’s homeland, Trichy – a small city in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu – Trichy. To understand our story and what our purpose is, knowing Sidd’s story is important which goes way back to his childhood. Growing up in Trichy as the youngest of six siblings with caring parents who strove to provide Sidd with “the gift of education”, Sidd had to move out of Trichy upon graduation to seek jobs, something that was not easy to find in his small city, at the time. Leaving his home and his beloved parents, especially his mother, was something that caused Sidd great distress. To transform the trajectory of lives, to create customer value everyday. But that did not stop Sidd from realizing the importance of hard work, beginning his career as a door-to-door salesman, growing and reaping rewards as a master salesman. His impeccable talent in sales and a chance job interview in an American technology talent hiring company, pulled him into the world of recruitment, experiencing phenomenal success as a recruiter hiring technology talents. His passionate efforts as a recruiter who could quickly close client requirements, landed him in the US to manage recruitment operations for the company in Pittsburgh on a global scale and growing their business by leaps and bounds. Although the US was the land of dreams, Sidd’s heart always yearned for Trichy. He knew Trichy had talents waiting to be discovered and utilized. After a decade of working in the US, Sidd took a leap of faith and decided to independently begin his own recruitment firm, selling his house and car in Detroit where he was at the time, to relocate with his family to Atlanta, Georgia where most of his clients were based. In the year 2007, at the peak of global recession, Sidd began VDart from the living room of his small apartment in Atlanta. Within the 1st year of operations, Sidd landed three major customers successfully kicking off our global professional services in talent management while single-handedly managing the entire sales and operations of the company. Sidd hired his first staff member a year and a half later, growing rapidly and adding more equally passionate members to his Atlanta office. To touch the lives of all associated with us; to create success and wealth and enhance the quality of life. In 2010, while on a visit to Trichy, he met a few close friends of his and shared his dream of creating opportunities in Trichy. Floored by his passion to give back to his hometown, they got together to set up our India office in Trichy. On the 4th of July, in 2010 a five member team began to work from the terrace of Sidd’s home in Trichy and thus began our journey of creating opportunities and transforming the trajectory of lives in Trichy. Today, in India we have over 750 employees having been able to create opportunities in their own hometowns. Back here in the US, we were acquiring customers led by our principle of customer – centricity and growing in revenues while our leadership team grew beyond Sidd. We realized that for a business to truly expand, a mindset of “learning to grow and transform” was imperative to craft a vision of what a company wanted to achieve, its purpose and understand how processes could be streamlined for optimal performance. Our leadership team in Atlanta benefited immensely by the learning partnerships with Tuck School of Business (at Dartmouth) and Northwestern Kellogg School of Management. Simultaneously, we grabbed opportunities and programs extended by Georgia’s Minority Supplier Development Council (GMSDC) to support small businesses run by minority groups by coaching and mentoring them to scale up business and streamline organization processes. VDart was mentored by Delta Airlines and Accenture which created a huge impact in our transition to a corporate organization. Today these learning programs and invaluable mentorship have been the cornerstone to developing our profound purpose and vision statements and have been pivotal in cultivating and building our immense sense of responsibility to not just our people but also our planet.

pages.title: Our Culture - VDart
pages.meta_description: Explore the VDart's vibrant culture, where innovation & collaboration converge. Join us to embrace diversity & shape the future with passion & purpose
headings: Purpose, People and Planet beyond Profits

sections.text: To thrive and stay relevant in this competitive business environment, it is crucial to invest in the people – that makes all the difference. As an organization, our purpose is our compass to craft our people policies, business strategies and also our commitment to the society and planet. In 2019, thanks to the priceless mentoring opportunity we gained from Accenture through their Diverse Supplier Development Program (DSDP), we were able to develop our Sustainability Roadmap, becoming the first organization in Trichy to commit to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (UN SDGs). We adopted and implemented five out of the 17 goals, developing our ESG policies and practices based on the 5 UN SDGs. Our undeterred, purpose-driven focus on ESG early on has helped us take intentional steps towards reducing our carbon footprints and we aim to be Net Zero by 2050. We are today an organization with offices in Atlanta, GA and Austin, TX besides offices in India, Malaysia, Canada, and the UAE serving clients across the world from Japan onward. Our purpose has been pivotal in building a culture that is rooted in our values. These values derived from our founder, have been the hallmark of our success in business and in driving our purpose. Our growth has been led by a culture of excellence in delivering our commitment to our clients, while being invested in our People’s development. Our stories reflect the value we aim to provide our clients, wanting to create a lasting impact. Our learning and mentoring programs for our people have been led by this deep sense of wanting to see our people grow with us as leaders who are led by thoughts and actions that uphold our integrity, championing innovation and an enterprising mindset. Our flagship people development programs like the SOAR Mentoring Program for Women, PROPEL Leadership Mentoring Initiative for the next-gen leaders and IGNITE for the emerging leaders are driven by various functions each with a distinct objective and outcome. We have partnered with premier business schools in India for our women in VDart, India aiming to see them grow as leaders.This is also one of our UN SDG commitments- to have 35% women employees in leadership roles by 2025 which was the driving force behind our momentous initiative in 2019 – the Global Women Leadership Initiative (GWLI) founded by Sidd, our VP People and Strategy – Oliver Sam and our executive board member, Veronica Moldonado-Torres. GWLI has been a game changer for our incredible women employees conducting workshops, webinars , facilitating and running mentoring programs progressed all these years by aligning all programs with our four key pillars. Personal and Professional Growth Development One of our unique Culture Rituals is our celebration of our successes and appreciation of our people. Our renowned annual Rewards and Recognitions Program (RNR) is a 2 day extravaganza held in Trichy where all our leaders and employees from across the globe converge in Trichy for a unique experience of being rewarded for their passion, values and their wins. This is a humongous event where our employees are felicitated not by our leaders but by their proud families who stand shoulder to shoulder on stage proudly giving away awards to their children or grandchildren, spouses or siblings, mothers or fathers. The joy on their faces is what we see as a culmination of our purpose of transforming lives and expressing our gratitude to those families who entrust their dear ones to us. ARISE, our powerful credo and value system guiding our purpose-driven organization, stands for “Action, Respect, Inspire, Serve, and Empower.” Our firm belief in and commitment to our twelve core values within ARISE, drive us toward achieving our purpose, defining what makes us who we are, and enabling us to thrive as a purpose-driven, ethical, and connected as one– VDart. We Treat People with Respect and Courtesy We are Storytellers – How We Impact Our Stakeholders and Our People We are Invested in Our People’s Development We Fearlessly Champion Big Ideas and Diligently Get Things Done We Drive Proactive and Intentional Change We are committed to act with a strong sense of urgency and are driven by purpose. We act together by assuming positive intent of others actions, shared purpose and create a positive impact. We always act with integrity in everything we do. We offer, seek clarity and simplify things. We value the efforts of everyone and celebrate success as OneVDart. We always treat people with respect and courtesy. We exemplify performance and inspire people to outperform. We always act in the best interest of VDart. We invest time, effort to learn and help others to learn. We embrace change and commit our actions towards growth. We dare to dream. Our grit and thoughful diligence drive us to champion our ideas and create a bigger impact. A good untold story is as good as a story that never happened. We intentionally bring out the success stories of every one of us to inspire all of us.

sections.text: VDart has evolved into one of the fastest-growing firms in digital talent management and digital technology consulting. We are focused on creating an impact on the communities we operate and serve. Shaping a responsible business with a strong sense of purpose has been our DNA for VDart. Driving our business to a more sustainable economy and keeping these areas at the forefront is the aim. Our strategic framework ensures that we excel in the key areas of sustainability and transformation for the benefit of our stakeholders, clients, and employees. VDart believes stakeholder engagement is an essential part of the growth and development of an organization. We consider people, communities, clients, suppliers, and partners as our direct stakeholders; thus, they hold a significant role in our business. And by working towards the economy, environment, and society, we want to show respect towards all our stakeholders. Our Sustainability Executive team has been working towards implementing our committed goals through various sustainable initiatives that help us engage better with our stakeholders. As much as we take from the environment, what we give back to restore balance should always be nothing less than the best. We craft compelling ways to reduce emissions and increase the efficiency of our resources to create a better place for everyone in our ecosystem. Empowering our society through our power has always been our area of focus. We commit ourselves to involve in activities that transcend the lives of all associated with us. By giving back to society we retain trust among our global community. By sharing our values and resources in our areas of expertise, we raise the stakes in social sustainability. Implementing a better experience for our clients has been the reason for our success. With our excellent business execution in every aspect of our strategy, we help our partners push boundaries protecting their data and upholding ethics to data security and transparency in our way of business. At VDart, we are committed to protecting the environment and preventing pollution by minimizing our environmental impact through the application of “reduce, reuse, and recycle” principles in our processes. We are committed to complying with all applicable legal and environmental regulations. Our commitment extends to promoting environmental responsibility among our employees and stakeholders, aimed at achieving objectives and targets and continually improving our environmental management system. Read our Sustainability Policy to know about our environmental, social, and governance commitments and how we’re determined making a positive global impact. See how VDart’s pursuit of an environmental, social, governance (ESG) agenda serves the interest of many stakeholders: associates, clients, partners, investors and shareholders. sections.text: We strategically connect people, processes, and technology to help our partners prepare for tomorrow by reimagining their businesses today. VDart has evolved to meet the needs of leading technology brands. From delivering resources for IT solutions to providing unique digital solutions, we’re continually reinventing ourselves. Our transformation has helped us become one of the fastest-growing digital talent management and technology consulting brands. With distinct digital practices, we help our partners to build for tomorrow by reimagining their businesses today. From helping our partners to bridge talent in digital and emerging technology fields to providing insights and expertise in product development and embedded software, we provide resources and solutions globally across a wide range of industries, from automotive and mobility to energy, healthcare, and life sciences, manufacturing, consumer industries and beyond. From a group of 5 in 2007, we’ve grown to a global force of over 4,000+ people today. With a proven ability to scale, we’re very proud to share our numbers. We focus on building relationships with our clients, continually striving to bring value to every interaction. Working with Fortune 1000, large four consulting firms, leading system integrators, & managed service providers, our expertise helps drive the future forward at a global level. We’re honored by our achievements and recognized as business leaders and our mission to foster diversity and inclusion and promote a rich culture among our workforce. pages.title: VDart partners with some of the best technology providers in the world
pages.meta_description: VDart looking to build mutually beneficial relationships, thus forging strong partnerships with some of the best technology providers in the world.

sections.text: VDart partners with industry leaders in Cloud, Intelligent Automation, IoT, Customer Experience and Security solutions. As a relationship driven organization, we’re always looking to develop mutually beneficial connections. Through this idea we’ve developed strong partnerships with the some of the world’s top technology providers. Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform, offering over 175 fully featured services from data centers globally. Using AWS, we help our customers lower costs, become more agile, and innovate faster. Google Cloud provides a comprehensive set of cloud computing services. We help customers meet business challenges head on with cloud computing services from Google, including data management, hybrid & multi-cloud, and AI & ML. Microsoft’s mission and values are to help people and businesses throughout the world realize their full potential. We help customers leverage Azure to invent with purpose, realize cost savings, and make their organization more efficient with Microsoft Azure’s open and flexible cloud computing platform. Salesforce is the world’s #1 customer relationship management (CRM) platform. Salesforce helps companies marketing, sales, commerce, service and IT teams work as one from anywhere — so you can keep your customers happy everywhere. The ServiceNow platform, using a powerful workflow engine with native AI, allows the creation of digital workflows that greatly unlock productivity and drive digital transformation. Snowflake Data Cloud provides a cloud agnostic, flexibility, and near-infinite scalability to easily load, integrate, analyze, and securely share data. Snowflake is a fully-managed service that’s simple to use but can power a near-unlimited number of concurrent workloads. Snowflake is the leading solution for data warehousing, data lakes, data engineering, data science, data application development, and for securely sharing and consuming shared data. Automation Anywhere is a global leader in Robotic Process Automation, offering cloud-native, web-based, intelligent automation solutions to the world’s largest organizations. We help organizations implement an ‘automation first’ strategy to become faster, more adaptable, and create capacity for innovation within their organizations UiPath is a leading Robotic Process Automation vendor providing a complete software platform to help organizations efficiently automate business processes. We deliver hyper automation solutions using an evolving set of AI technologies to automate more knowledge work and engage everyone in an organization to automate alongside robots, all managed and orchestrated on a scalable and secure platform. Learn more about VDart and UiPath’s partnership by clicking here. As a leading enterprise low-code platform Appian makes it easier to build solutions for complex business problems. By using the Appian platform we help our clients rapidly transform and integrate their business operations. Unqork is a completely visual, no-code application platform that helps large enterprises build complex custom software faster, with higher quality, and lower costs than traditional approaches. All without a single line of code. Learn more about VDart and unqork’s partnership by clicking here. The solutions provided by Forgerock help people safely and simply connect worldwide through exceptional digital experiences, developing commercial open source identity and access management products for enterprise, consumer, cloud, mobile and IoT environments. With our expertise within these fields, we partner with Forgerock to produce better business solutions for our clients including IAM implementation and post implementation production support for a large automotive manufacturer. Adobe Experience Cloud is a collection of applications and services built on the first platform specifically designed for unmatched customer experiences, giving customers the most comprehensive tools for insights, content, engagement, and more. BigCommerce’s mission is to help merchants sell more at every stage of business growth. Simply put, we are: built for growth so merchants can realize their visions without compromise; designed for powerful performance to enable businesses to scale seamlessly with technology they can trust; efficient in both time and cost.

pages.title: Students Internship Program at VDart Inc
pages.meta_description: Take your first steps into a meaningful career with VDart internship programs. We offer training and guidance in the academic fields of students.

sections.text: Our vision is to touch the lives of all associated with us to create success, wealth, and enhance the quality of life. We believe that any individual is capable of making this vision come true. This is why we not only evaluate internship applications based on GPA and standardized test results, we also look at the character, the mindset, and the ambition of the student. Every year VDart scouts for the brightest of minds for the VDart Internship Program to help grow and develop young talent. We provide hands-on training and guidance in the student’s respective academic fields. For current high school students, we consult with the corresponding counselors to maximize the internship benefits through credits, letters of recommendation, certifications, and project experience. We also provide paid internships on a case to case basis, which includes standard benefits and flexibility between part-time and full-time internships. VDart Interns have been accepted to several Ivy League schools and graduates have received career placements as a result of the experience gained at VDart. We provide internships to students interested in Business Fundamentals, Mathematics, Computer Science/Engineering, Marketing & Communications, and Visual Arts. The Internship Program at VDart allows its interns to learn aforementioned technologies at a rapid pace while performing projects to refine their learning. In the internship, they will also be provided guidance by experienced mentors to lead them down the right paths. Our interns have worked on a variety of projects ranging from game development using Python, Unity and Blender 3D, a mobile app and web dashboard that helps candidates with their onboarding process that were built using ReactJS and React Native, a web app that connects small businesses with users that was built using ReactJS and MeteorJS, and a lot of other powerful, beautifully developed applications. Each internship is catered differently based on the student’s needs. The Internship Program will last for 3 months, or a semester, and through it, the interns will have a guided learning process, tailored to their needs and interests in technology and programming. Successful interns typically extend this duration to 6 months to 1 year to help amplify their resumes for either college applications or for professional pursuits. Towards the end of the program, interns will be given a capstone project, which will be a large project designed to display and showcase all of the knowledge that they have collected during their journey at VDart. As mentioned previously, paid internships are awarded to select individuals who have demonstrated academic excellence and are able to demonstrate their skills in active projects. All internships are awarded the following 4 areas purely based on performance and internship outcome: Letter of Recommendation Interns will receive a custom letter to be used for further education or for career opportunities Interns will receive a custom letter to be used for further education or for career opportunities Industry Related Certification Interns will have the opportunity to enroll in paid certification programs to help elevate their hands-on skills for their specific field Interns will have the opportunity to enroll in paid certification programs to help elevate their hands-on skills for their specific field Resume Referral Interns can display their internship supervisor’s contact information as a referral directly on their resume once they’ve received permission Interns can display their internship supervisor’s contact information as a referral directly on their resume once they’ve received permission Job Placement For undergraduate and graduate students only based purely on the recommendation of their internship supervisor For undergraduate and graduate students only based purely on the recommendation of their internship supervisor

sections.section_title: Do you know someone who would be a great fit for VDart?
sections.text: Refer a friend, former colleague, or family member with the right skills to join our team. We are continuously seeking skilled professionals across a wide range of fields, including both IT and non-IT roles. Our areas of interest include Information Technology, Engineering, Scientific & Clinical, Professional & Managerial, Legal, Human Resources, Marketing & Creative, Call Centers, and more. Successfully referring a candidate can earn you a one-time bonus of $250. Refer to the VDart policy below for more details. VDart offers a referral bonus to employees who refer candidates hired by VDart or its clients, provided the following conditions are met: Eligibility: The referred candidate must not have been in contact with a VDart recruiter for at least 3 months. Employment Duration: The referred candidate must complete 90 days on billing before the referral bonus is awarded to the referring consultant. sections.text: Empower your business transformation with a global team of passionate technologists. We specialize in delivering exceptional digital services tailored to your unique needs. Our customer-centric approach and technical expertise ensure optimized costs and maximized efficiency. We work closely with you to understand your business goals and challenges. Our team of technology experts then thoroughly analyzes your IT environment. Leveraging their deep understanding of the latest trends and solutions, we craft the optimal path forward for your digital transformation. Partner with us for full-service support across your entire IT environment. Enhance your current team with our expert support in your digital transformation journey. Utilize our proven best practices when implementing new products or undergoing modernization. Address any security compromises confidently, knowing you're partnering with industry-leading experts. VDart is one of the most trusted IT staffing agencies in the United States, serving clients across various industries. We are committed to providing talents that help our clients achieve their organizational and operational goals. Our experts analyze our clients’ business challenges, market dynamics, and organizational culture to bring together the right people. Specializing in digital and emerging technology, we offer talent in niche areas such as SMAC (social, mobile, analytics, and cloud), ERP (SAP and Oracle), Business Intelligence, and Infrastructure. When we claim to be the leader, we back it up with proven results! We understand the need for UAE businesses to adapt to the country’s evolving cultural landscape, both domestically and internationally. With our global reach and comprehensive staffing solutions, we cater to a diverse clientele, honing our expertise in identifying niche talent across North America, EMEA, APAC, Latin America, Canada, and UAE. Our commitment ensures our clients have continuous access to the right talent, regardless of location or time zone. Reach out to us today and embark on the journey towards building a truly diverse and successful workplace. Contract to hire enables organizations to engage additional staff for some time with the option to convert them to full-time employment. Working with clients across a wide range of industries, we provide contract-to-hire solutions for projects where resources need to be filled immediately but with a view toward future growth. Our contract-to-hire services help our clients to evaluate the risk of hiring directly and to know in the initial contract period if a candidate is a perfect fit. Our recruiting specialists have made screening and hiring for short-term projects more accessible for our clients. Our contract services enable our clients to fill short-term staffing needs across industries. Our dedicated team works closely with our clients to meet their staffing needs for upcoming projects and seasonal requirements. Hiring individuals on a contract basis allows these companies to maintain staff levels. We invest time in understanding our client’s business requirements, industry skill sets, workforce market, and other relevant information regarding the position to ensure we deliver the right candidate. Our recruitment experts employ leading search processes to find, screen, and qualify candidates. We save our clients time and costs by making hiring more efficient candidates by ensuring they have the right talent that fits the job description and matches company culture, attitude, and tenure for long-term success. Our extensive experience, expertise in supplier rationalization, and established track record of working with industry leaders speak for themselves, as our portfolio showcases successful collaborations with complex, multi-billion-dollar clients. Our reputation spans across continents, including the USA, Canada, the UK, and India, and our global presence empowers us to deliver cost savings and minimize disruptions, regardless of the geographic location. Our core objectives encompass optimizing tail spending, achieving substantial cost savings within our existing contractor relationships, and reducing both direct and indirect supplier layers. We specialize in tailored contract negotiation, compliance, governance, and support for geographical expansion. What truly sets VDart apart is our exclusive Preferred Partner program, backed by robust governance, substantial financial support, and a dedicated legal and compliance team essential for the efficient execution of the Supplier Rationalization Initiative. As a certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE Supplier), we are committed to enhancing our clients’ diversity spending, while our extensive support empowers them to expand into new regions. VDart serves as a trusted interface between clients and vendors, ensuring compliance in various operating environments. We provide an all-inclusive range of HTD (Hire, Train & Deploy) solutions that offer a fresh approach to talent acquisition, development, and deployment, helping our clients source, train, and place the right talent for their organizations, whether they are small businesses or global corporations. Our tailored training programs, including accent-neutral, technical, and cultural fitment training, ensure that our clients are equipped with a seamless talent pipeline from entry-level to specialized roles, with access to diverse markets and talent pools worldwide to serve a global clientele. From background checks to payroll management, VDart handles operational intricacies with a customized approach, ensuring a hassle-free experience. Our strong relationships with prestigious universities like Indian Institutes of Management (IIT), National Institutes of Technology (NIT) in India, and Georgia Tech in the United States, along with expert trainers from industry leaders such as IBM and HP leverage our technology curriculum to equip our clients’ workforce with cutting-edge technical skills and help them identify, report, resolve issues, handle customer interactions, and more. Dedicated to promoting diversity and inclusion, VDart facilitates expanded diversity spending and global expansion.
